data.title: Essence SmartCare Partners with One Community to Complete Digital Care Transformation
data.description: The implementation of an AI-driven telecare platform has facilitated the introduction of advanced, preemptive services as the UK's shift towards digitalization gains momentum. On March 31, 2026, in London, Essence SmartCare, a prominent provider of AI-facilitated care and security solutions, and a key player in connected care, announced the deployment. This initiative aims to enhance care services through AI technology for improved efficiency, with significant advancements in proactive care services anticipated.

data.title: Global ban on digital duties ends as WTO talks fail. Taxing digital downloads now allowed after prohibition expiry.
data.description: The ban on taxing digital downloads has ended as members of the World Trade Organization concluded their yearly meeting without reaching an agreement. This prohibition, which was in place to prevent levies on digital content such as software, music, and e-books, has now lapsed. The decision comes after the WTO failed to come to a consensus during their annual gathering. This development could potentially impact the taxation of online purchases and downloads worldwide.
Dassault Systèmes filed their 2025 Universal Registration Document, containing important financial info.

data.description: Individuals with insider status have the potential to gain significant financial advantages that regular shareholders do not have access to. data.title: OVER 17,000 TEAMSTERS AVERT NATIONWIDE STRIKE AT FIRST STUDENT, REACH TENTATIVE AGREEMENT
data.description: Bus workers recently avoided a potential nationwide strike after the Teamsters First Student National Negotiating Committee (TFSNNC) secured a promising tentative agreement with First Student. The contract guarantees significant enhancements and prevents disruption for over 20,000 employees. The negotiations successfully addressed key concerns, leading to a positive outcome for all parties involved. The agreement showcases the importance of effective communication and resolution in labor disputes, ultimately benefiting the workers and the company.

data.title: FourLeaf Federal Credit Union Celebrates Women’s History Month with Community-Wide Volunteer Initiatives Supporting Women and Families Across Long Island
data.description: FourLeaf Federal Credit Union in Bethpage, N.Y. is celebrating Women's History Month by launching a series of volunteer initiatives to assist women and families in Long Island. Their employees are dedicating time to partner with local organizations to offer crucial resources, comfort, and care to those in need. In support of this cause, FourLeaf team members are volunteering with organizations focusing on health and family services.

data.title: Amazon Stock Is Priced For A Crisis — But Is It 2008 All Over Again?
data.description: The current price of Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) stock suggests an impending downturn, despite the company's robust business compared to the 2008 financial crisis. The stock is trading with a forward P/E ratio of approximately 24.5 and a trailing P/E ratio of around 27.8, as reported by Benzinga Pro data. This places Amazon's stock valuation just slightly above the broader market, despite its rapid growth and improved profitability. Amazon's shares are currently at their lowest forward P/E ratio since November 2008, with a forward P/E of 24.69 and a trailing P/E of 27.80. This is a significant drop from its five-year average multiple of around 63x, indicating strong earnings growth. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Irenic Sends Letter to Snap Inc. Co-Founder and CEO Evan Spiegel and Issues Presentation Outlining Actionable Steps to Unlock Value
data.description: Irenic Capital Management, LP, a significant shareholder of Snap Inc., owning about 2.5% of the Company's Class A shares, has reached out to Snap's Co-Founder and CEO, Evan Spiegel, proposing a plan to achieve $26.37 per share. In their letter titled "Snap Back to Reality: Save Snap Now," Irenic outlines their strategic approach. The presentation is available for viewing and download at SaveS.
USS George H W Bush CVN-77 departed Naval Station Norfolk for deployment - reports

data.title: OSL Group Announces 2025 Annual Results: Record-High Revenue with Strategic Transformation to a Global Stablecoin Payment and Trading Platform
data.description: In 2025, the total revenue soared to an all-time high, witnessing a significant triple-digit increase in core operating income compared to the previous year. The company successfully transitioned into a worldwide platform for stablecoin payments and trading, laying the groundwork for a sustainable and expandable stablecoin network. Notably, stablecoin trading volume made up 60% of the total trading activities on the platform.

data.title: New Research Finds the Fertility Conversation is Broken: Most People Want Comprehensive Care Beyond IVF, But Aren't Getting It
data.description: A recent survey of over 1,000 adults revealed a strong desire for metabolic health, men's health, and less invasive fertility options. However, less than 50% of respondents have actually discussed these topics with a healthcare provider. The survey was conducted in West Des Moines, Iowa, and the results were released on March 31, 2026. The demand for these health topics indicates a need for more open communication and support in these areas.

data.title: DeuteRx Celebrates Women's History Month with Over a Decade of Pioneering Leadership in Drug Discovery
data.description: In commemoration of Women's History Month, DeuteRx, LLC's Chair, President, and CEO, Sheila DeWitt, PhD, offers insights on the company's 15 years of Drug Discovery and its participation in Four significant M&A Transactions. The event took place in Boston on March 31, 2026. DeWitt highlights the pivotal role of women and women-led businesses in shaping the pharmaceutical industry's landscape.

data.title: Sound Group Swings To Profit As Massive AI Push Pays Off
data.description: Sound Group Inc. (NASDAQ: SOGP) announced its robust 2025 financial performance, marked by a return to profitability and significant revenue growth stemming from its AI-powered audio business. The company reported a full-year net income of 220.6 million Chinese yuan ($31.6 million), marking a turnaround from a net loss in the prior year. Revenue for the year surged by 53% year over year to 3,102.8 million Chinese yuan ($443.7 million). In the latter half of 2025, net income stood at 153.1 million Chinese yuan ($21.9 million), reflecting a reversal from the previous year's losses, while revenue for this period escalated by 58% to 1,745.1 million Chinese yuan ($249.5 million).The growth was primarily driven by the expansion of value-added services and increased subscription revenue, bolstered by the company's expanding AI applications portfolio. Notably, the gross profit for the year soared by 63% to 905.2 million Chinese yuan, with the gross margin experiencing an improvement, reaching 29%. Furthermore, the operating income for 2025 totaled 217 million Chinese yuan.

data.title: Micron Stock Price Target Slashed After Plunge
data.description: On Tuesday, Citi, an investment bank, reduced its price target on Micron Technology stock following a decline in investor interest. This decision came after the memory-chip maker experienced a decrease in popularity among investors. This move reflects a shift in sentiment towards Micron stock and indicates challenges ahead for the company. The specific numbers related to the price target reduction were not provided, but it signifies a significant adjustment based on market conditions. The overall impact of this development on Micron's stock price and market performance will be closely monitored by investors and analysts.

data.title: Phoenix Asia Holdings Limited Announces Unaudited Financial Results For The Six Months Ended September 30, 2025
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Phoenix Asia Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: PHOE), a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, revealed its unaudited financial figures for the six months concluded on September 30, 2025. Operating through its subsidiary Winfield Engineering (Hong Kong) Limited, PHOE specializes in substructure activities like site formation, ground investigation, and foundation works in Hong Kong. It's vital to note that despite being minimally operationally involved, PHOE serves in these capacities.

data.title: Darco Spirits Brings American Harvest Vodka Home to Pennsylvania
data.description: Philadelphia-based company has grown its presence to over 200 Pennsylvania Liquor Control Board (PLCB) locations across the state.
